        Eb/Ab  Ab  Ab/Db  Db

   Ab            Db7M

        Eb         C7/E

        Fm          Ab/Eb         Db7M

       Ab           Db7M 
Winter cold cut the air
         Eb       C7/E

           Fm           Ab/Eb       Db7M   Db/Eb  Eb

Ab7                             Db        Ab/C Bbm

           Bbm7M      Bbm7    Eb/G  Eb
We sat and watched a distant light

          B          D#m         E    F#7(4)

              B
We're still here
               D#m           E7M

        Eb/G   G#m      F#             E7M

( F#  Ab7M  Db7M  )

             Ab           Db7M

                 Eb         C7/E

           Ab              Db7M            Eb

  C7/E  Fm                 Ab/Eb             Db7M

( Db/Eb  Eb )

Ab7                                      Db  <Ab/C Bbm
